infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Whim uses your location to find venues and spontaneous plans near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Whim uses your location to find venues and spontaneous plans near you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Whim uses your camera so you can add a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Whim uses your photo library so you can choose a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSCalendarUsageDescription: Whim reads your calendar so you can see your schedule alongside your plans.
